description: Bare HTTP GET requests consistently return a 200 OK status but the response body contains a captcha/verification challenge instead of the expected profile data or embedded JSON state. Reproduction: curl -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" https://www.tiktok.com/@tiktok
mitigation: Migrated TikTok to PlaywrightCrawler to natively solve/bypass SSR Captcha blocks by rendering the page.

description: Bare HTTP requests and Apify residential proxies both fail to hit SSR HTML containing SIGI_STATE or __UNIVERSAL_DATA_FOR_REHYDRATION__. The response contains a captcha challenge. Cheerio extraction yields 0% success.
mitigation: Migrated TikTok to PlaywrightCrawler to natively solve/bypass SSR Captcha blocks by rendering the page.
evidence: Out.log from HARDEN phase execution showing 16 validation failures

description: High likelihood of HTTP 403 Forbidden when accessing YouTube from Datacenter IPs without rendering JavaScript or having residential reputation
mitigation: CheerioCrawler residential proxy mapping + injected CONSENT cookie in preNavigationHooks

description: Redirects or blocks via consent.youtube.com for European IPs or unconsented automated sessions
mitigation: CheerioCrawler residential proxy mapping + injected CONSENT cookie in preNavigationHooks

description: LinkedIn returns HTTP 999 for bare HTTP requests without proper headers or browser fingerprinting, indicating a strict anti-bot challenge wall.
mitigation: Injected session tokens (li_at, JSESSIONID) via PlaywrightCrawler preNavigationHooks.

description: Reddit API enforces rate limiting via x-ratelimit-* headers: 100 requests per 600-second window. Exceeding the limit returns HTTP 429. Reproduction: send >100 requests within 10 minutes to any .json endpoint.
mitigation: CheerioCrawler with SessionPool handles retry on HTTP 429. Rate limit headroom is 100 req/600s — well within budget for profile scraping use case.
evidence: HARDEN sweep: 10/10 real URLs extracted cleanly, 2 nonexistent returned 404 correctly. 12 requests within 100/600s rate limit window. CheerioCrawler + Residential proxy.

description: Google Maps returns a Consent wall in EU regions or an "Unusual traffic from your computer network" CAPTCHA screen when scraping Business Profiles via bare HTTP requests, especially on datacenter IPs.
mitigation: Use PlaywrightCrawler with residential proxies and human-like delays. Implement detectBlock() to catch CAPTCHA or unusual traffic strings.

description: Twitter/X redirects to a login/sign-in wall when accessing profile pages without a valid session cookie. Status 200 is returned but content is restricted to login prompts.
mitigation: PlaywrightCrawler with fail-fast detectBlock() logic. Login walls are correctly identified, and the framework supports session cookie injection (auth_token, ct0) to bypass them.

description: Google Search returns a /sorry/ CAPTCHA page or "unusual traffic" challenge when receiving repeated or automated requests from datacenter IPs or browser sessions without high reputation.
